subject: [RFC PATCH 1/2] virtio-balloon: extend stats with memory composition and pressure data

2026-05-13.patch_summary: This patch extends the virtio-balloon statistics to include memory composition and pressure data, allowing for more informed proactive ballooning decisions. It adds 11 new statistics tags to the existing balloon stats virtqueue, including metrics for dirty pages, writeback pages, anonymous pages, inactive file LRU, slab reclaimable memory, working set refaults, and PSI (Pressure Stall Information) metrics for memory and IO pressure. The patch also exports psi_system for module builds when CONFIG_VIRTIO_BALLOON=m with CONFIG_PSI=y.
